emails.subject: January Penalty Support - SWG
emails.body: January Penalty Support SWG Jane, I just faxed the January penalty support. Also, you mentioned that we should be billing penalties on the trigger deal 386140 (EPNG Blanco Supply Area). However, this deal is linked to the same contract as the penalty for the nomination error. I have checked the contract again, and all of the exhibits are expired. In addition, I cannot find an exhibit which covers EPNG-Blanco Supply Area. Given this information, would you still like me to bill the penalty, and if so, at what rate? Thanks for your help Laurie

emails.subject: Re: January Penalty Support - SWG
emails.body: Re: January Penalty Support SWG I want to penalize them for the volumes they are not taking on the trigger deal. I know they are not going to pay but I still want to bill them anyway. So- is the SW gas contract a one-way contract. we are bound by their terms but they are not.
